{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Grayweather library
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Grayweather library]] is located at [[Calder]]'s home.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
